name: Income above ACC cap
description: Individual earning NZD 200,000 per year (top tax bracket, ACC levy capped at NZD 156,641)

sources.description: Calculated using 2026-27 PAYE rates, ACC levy (1.75%), and IETC from IRD
sources.notes: PAYE: All 5 brackets including top 39% rate above $180,000. ACC: Capped at 1.75% of $156,641 = $2,741.22. IETC: $0 (income above $70,000).
